Navigate to the cybersecurity post about phishing attacks at https://sa-forum-aa-1.chats-lab-gui-agent.uk/f/cybersecurity/9/how-to-counter-phishing-attacks and take a screenshot of the page. Save the screenshot to /workspace/phishing_post_screenshot.png

### Error
Error: server: Chromium distribution 'chrome' is not found at /opt/google/chrome/chrome
Run "npx playwright install chrome"

### Error

Run "npx playwright install chrome"

It seems there was an error while trying to navigate to the webpage and take a screenshot due to a missing Chromium distribution. Unfortunately, I cannot access the webpage or take a screenshot at this moment. 

If you have any other requests or need assistance with something else, please let me know!
